verbatim_quote: "It works for me as a solo practitioner"

notes: Customer support is emerging as Acuity's #1 fresh grievance this week — multiple reviewers echo the no-phone, online-form-only complaint

verbatim_quote: "Getting someone from support to help me is hit-or-miss, and of course, if I need help on a weekend, they don't have any support team available."
notes: Acuity has weekday-only chat (M-F 4am-8pm ET); weekend coverage is a documented gap for solo operators working Saturdays

verbatim_quote: "extremely buggy" ... "about 50% of new clients reporting that appointments never appear in their accounts"

verbatim_quote: "really confusing" ... "buried in weird places"

verbatim_quote: "Once the contract was signed, the tone shifted. Flexibility disappeared. Concerns were met with references to policy and agreement terms rather than practical problem-solving."

verbatim_quote: "Bait and switch company taking advantage of small businesses with little to no transparency about their program without actually signing up and paying ridiculous fees. Then will not allow you to cancel (one day later) when you finally enter the program... Do not sign any kind of contract with them because you will absolutely not be able to get out."

verbatim_quote: "paying each month until the end of the contract period for nothing"
